case_title: JOHN SHEK VS. ALLSTATE INSURANCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY PLANTIFF **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-21-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN SHEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL MIGUEL, SR. STAFF LITIGATION CONSULTANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLS PAULO IS NOT PRESENT. CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND RE-SERVE DEFENDANTS. THIS IS PLAINTIFF'S SECOND REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR HIM TO FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
